name: mitm-tooling
documentation:
# mitm-support

This python package contains basic functionality to work with "Models-in-the-Middle" (MitM) data sets.
It bundles a generic mechanism to load and export relational data as a configurable MitM.

returns.name: dict | int | float | str | list | None

class_variables.name: mitm_tooling.extraction.sql.db.db_schema_query.SemanticColumnCondition.contained_value
documentation: remember this is evaluated on just a sample!

type.name:
Callable[
                                               [MITM, ConceptName, ConceptProperties, OwnedRelations,
                                                dict[RelationName, sa.Column], list[tuple[RelationName, sa.Column]]],
                                               Generator[
                                                   sqlalchemy.sql.schema.SchemaItem, None, None]] | None
